items.title: Why we stopped hand-building TYPO3 templates
items.description: Every project used to start with three weeks of template work. Now it starts with composer require — here's the math that convinced us, and what we do with the time instead.

items.title: 49 components that make 255 elements feel like one design
items.description: 17 atoms, 28 molecules, 4 layout primitives. The architecture decision that keeps a quarter-thousand content elements perfectly consistent — and your custom ones too.

items.title: Accessible by default, audited on every commit
items.description: Semantic landmarks, visible focus states, WCAG 2.2-checked contrast on all 15 presets, and an 11-category template audit with zero tolerance. Pass your next a11y review before it starts.
